summary: A clip from a Fox 10 segment with a DEVELOPING banner. It shows a booking-style photograph of a woman with long dark hair displayed full-frame with a faint overlay pattern, then traffic-camera footage of a multi-lane highway with an overturned vehicle on its roof beside the median, time-stamped and labeled ADOT. The lower-third reads MOM ARRESTED AFTER DEADLY ROLLOVER CRASH ON THE I-17, NEAR PEORIA AVE, 9-YEAR-OLD GIRL DEAD AFTER BEING EJECTED FROM CAR.

script.scene: A booking-style photo of a woman is shown full-frame; lower-third reads DEVELOPING.
Traffic-camera footage labeled ADOT shows a multi-lane highway with an overturned vehicle on its roof beside the median; lower-third reads MOM ARRESTED AFTER DEADLY ROLLOVER CRASH ON THE I-17.
Continued traffic-camera footage of the highway; lower-third notes a 9-year-old girl dead after being ejected from the car.

notable_text: FOX 10; DEVELOPING; MOM ARRESTED AFTER DEADLY ROLLOVER CRASH ON THE I-17; NEAR PEORIA AVE - 9-YEAR-OLD GIRL DEAD AFTER BEING EJECTED FROM CAR; ADOT
